widgets.name: Form_EditionIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: The edition identifier of the form including the form number and edition (the date is typically formatted YYYY/MM).

widgets.name: Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage).

widgets.name: Form_CompletionDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The date on which the form is completed.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: Producer_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The full name of the producer / agency.

widgets.name: Policy_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols.  If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number.

widgets.name: Policy_EffectiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: Insurer_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name.

widgets.name: Insurer_NAICCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The identification code assigned to the insurer by the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC).

widgets.name: NamedInsured_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The named insured(s) as it / they will appear on the policy declarations page.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_CoverageIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the claims made or occurrence option applies for the general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_ClaimsMadeIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the "claims made" option applies on the general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OccurrenceIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, occurrence basis applies.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OwnersAndContractorsProtectiveIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the owners and contractors protective option applies for the general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OtherCoverageIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates other coverage not found on the form exists for the general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OtherCoverageDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other coverage (not the limit) on the general liability policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_PropertyDamage_DeductibleIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if a property damage deductible is requested.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_PropertyDamage_DeductibleAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter deductible: The deductible applicable to the Property Damage coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_BodilyInjury_DeductibleIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if a bodily injury deductible is requested.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_BodilyInjury_DeductibleAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter deductible: The deductible applicable to the Bodily Injury coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OtherDeductibleIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that a deductible is requested on the coverage other than Property Damage or Bodily Injury.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OtherDeductibleDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The type of deductible being requested other than property damage and bodily injury.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OtherDeductibleAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter deductible: The deductible applicable to the Other Coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_DeductiblePerClaimIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that a per claim deductible applies to individual claims even if the claims are all related to the same occurrence or event.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_DeductiblePerOccurrenceIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that a per occurrence deductible applies once to each occurrence no matter how many individual claims result from the occurrence or event.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_GeneralAggregate_LimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, general aggregate limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_GeneralAggregate_LimitAppliesPerPolicyIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies per policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_GeneralAggregate_LimitAppliesPerProjectIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies per project.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_GeneralAggregate_LimitAppliesPerLocationIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies per location.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_GeneralAggregate_LimitAppliesToOtherIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies to option is other than those listed on the form.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_GeneralAggregate_LimitAppliesToCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the other option to which the general liability policy, general aggregate limit applies.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_ProductsAndCompletedOperations_AggregateLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, products and completed operations aggregate limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_PersonalAndAdvertisingInjury_LimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, personal and advertising injury limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_EachOccurrence_LimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, each occurrence limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_FireDamageRentedPremises_EachOccurrenceLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, damage to rented premises each occurrence limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_MedicalExpense_EachPersonLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, medical expense each person limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_EmployeeBenefits_LimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability employee benefits limit amount.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OtherCoverageLimitDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other coverage (not the limit) on the general liability policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OtherCoverageLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, other coverage limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_PremisesOperations_PremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The premium for premises/operations coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Products_PremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The premium for products coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OtherCoveragePremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The premium for other general liability coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_TotalPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The total premium amount for the commercial general liability line of business.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_RemarkText_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The remarks associated with the general liability line of business.  Use this section to provide any additional information required for underwriting or rating.  ACORD 101, Additional Remarks Schedule, may be attached if more space is required.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_UninsuredUnderinsuredMotorists_CoverageAvailableIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if uninsured/underinsured motorist coverage is to be provided under the policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_UninsuredUnderinsuredMotorists_CoverageAvailableNoIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that  uninsured/underinsured motorist coverage is not  to be provided under the policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_MedicalPayments_CoverageAvailableIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that medical payment coverage is to be provided under the policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_MedicalPayments_CoverageAvailableNoIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates that medical payment coverage is not to be provided under the policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_LocationProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The producer assigned identifier for the location number of the risk's location as it appears on the Applicant Information Section of ACORD 125.  All classifications should be grouped by location number.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_HazardProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: A unique (within location) number distinguishing this unit-at-risk from the others.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_ClassCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The general liability class code that corresponds to the classification description shown in the previous field.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_PremiumBasisCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: An industry code designating the rating basis of the exposure amount.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_Exposure_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The amount of the exposure used for this class code in calculating the premium.  The contents of this data element depends on the rating basis used.  The full amount of exposure is contained.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_TerritoryCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The rating territory code based on location from the appropriate state exception page.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_PremisesOperationsRate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter rate: The separate Premises Operations manual rate applicable to the classification.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_ProductsRate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter rate: The separate Products rate applicable to the classification.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_PremisesOperationsPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The premium associated with the premises operations coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_ProductsPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The premium associated with the products coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Hazard_Classification_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The classification of the applicant's liability exposures by location, using the ISO Classification Table or other industry organization rules.  Enter the appropriate class description from the table in this field.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_ClaimsMade_ProposedRetroactiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The retroactive date you are requesting for the policy being applied for. This is the proposed earliest date for which an occurrence could "trigger" coverage under a Claims Made policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_ClaimsMade_UninterruptedCoverageEntryDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The retroactive date shown on the applicant's first Claims Made policy.  If this is the first such policy, the date will be the same as the proposed retroactive date shown on the preceding field. If this is a renewal, it is the effective date of the first policy issued in the sequence of uninterrupted Claims Made policies.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_AAHCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Has any product, work, accident or location been excluded, uninsured or self-insured from any previous coverage?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_AnyProductWorkAccidentLocationExcludedUninsuredPreviousCoverageExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any work, accident or location that has been excluded, uninsured or self-insured from any previous coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_AAICode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Was tail coverage purchased under any previous policy?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_TailCoveragePurchasedPreviousPolicyExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation if tail was coverage purchased under any previous policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_EmployeeBenefits_PerClaimDeductibleAmount_A

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_EmployeeBenefits_EmployeeCount_A

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_EmployeeBenefits_EmployeeCoveredCount_A

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_EmployeeBenefits_RetroactiveDate_A

widgets.name: Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage).

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_Item_ScheduledItemClassCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The description of the property class of the scheduled item (i.e. Jewelry, Furs, Contractors Equipment, etc.).

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_Item_ScheduledItemProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The producer assigned number of the scheduled item which has an additional interest.

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_ItemDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the item of interest if needed to further clarify.  For a vehicle, list the make, model and VIN number.  For a scheduled item, list the description, such as three carat diamond in six point setting.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_ABJCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any medical facilities provided or medical professionals employed or contracted?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_AnyMedicalFacilitiesProvidedMedicalProfessionalsEmployedExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any medical facilities provided or medical professionals employed or contracted.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_ACACode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any exposure to radioactive/nuclear materials?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_AnyExposureRadioactiveMaterialsExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any exposure to radioactive/nuclear materials

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_ACJCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Do/have past, present or discontinued operations involve(d) storing, treating, discharging, applying, disposing, or transporting of hazardous material?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_OperationsInvolveStoringDisposingTransportingHazardousMaterialExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation any operations that involve storing, treating, discharging, applying, disposing or transporting hazardous material.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_ACBCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any operations sold, acquired or discontinued in the last specified number of years?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_AnyListedOperationsSoldAcquiredLastFiveYearsExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any listed operations sold, acquired, or discontinued in the last five (5) years.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_ACCCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Do you rent or loan equipment to others?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_MachineryOrEquipmentLoanedRentedOthersExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of  any machinery or equipment that is loaned or rented to others.

widgets.name: CommercialInlandMarineProperty_PropertySubClass_SmallToolsIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the subclass / grouping of property into which the item falls is small tools.

widgets.name: CommercialInlandMarineProperty_PropertySubClass_LargeEquipmentIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the subclass / grouping of property into which the item falls is large equipment.

widgets.name: PropertyItem_ItemDetail_InstructionGivenCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates whether instruction is given on how to use the item when it is rented or loaned to others.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_MachineryOrEquipmentLoanedRentedOthersExplanation_B
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of  any machinery or equipment that is loaned or rented to others.

widgets.name: CommercialInlandMarineProperty_PropertySubClass_SmallToolsIndicator_B
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the subclass / grouping of property into which the item falls is small tools.

widgets.name: CommercialInlandMarineProperty_PropertySubClass_LargeEquipmentIndicator_B
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the subclass / grouping of property into which the item falls is large equipment.

widgets.name: PropertyItem_ItemDetail_InstructionGivenCode_B
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates whether instruction is given on how to use the item when it is rented or loaned to others.

widgets.name: Contractors_Question_AAHCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any watercraft, docks, floats owned, hired or leased?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_WatercraftDocksFloatsOwnedHiredLeasedExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any watercraft, docks, floats owned, hired, or leased.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_ACDCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any parking facilities owned/rented?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_AnyParkingFacilitiesOwnedRentedExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any parking facilities owned/ rented.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_KAGCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Is a fee charged for parking?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_FeeChargedForParkingExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any fee charged for parking.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_ACECode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Recreation facilities provided?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_RecreationalFacilitiesProvidedExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of  any recreational facilities provided.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_KAACode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, " Are there any lodging operations including apartments?"

widgets.name: BuildingOccupancy_ApartmentCount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The number of separate living units in structure.

widgets.name: BuildingOccupancy_ApartmentArea_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The area, in square feet, of the building used as apartments.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_Otherlodgingoperationsdescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other lodging operations.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_KAHCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Is there a swimming pool on the premises?".

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_ApprovedFenceIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool is surrounded by a fence that is an approved height.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_LimitedAccessIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates there is limited access to the swimming pool.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_DivingBoardIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool has a diving board.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_SlideIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool has a slide.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_AboveGroundIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool is above ground.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_InGroundIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the swimming pool is in the ground.

widgets.name: SwimmingPool_LifeGuardIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates there is life guard for the swimming pool.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_ACFCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are social events sponsored?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_SportingOrSocialEventsSponsoredExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any social events sponsored.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_KABCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Are athletic teams sponsored?"

widgets.name: AthleticTeam_SportDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the type of sport in which the sponsored athletic team is involved.

widgets.name: AthleticTeam_ContactSportCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates if the sponsored athletic team is involved in a contact sport.

widgets.name: AthleticTeam_AgeGroup_TwelveAndUnderIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the sport participants are 12 years old or under.

widgets.name: AthleticTeam_AgeGroup_ThirteenThroughEighteenIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the sport participants are 13 through 18 years old.

widgets.name: AthleticTeam_AgeGroup_OverEighteenIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the sport participants are over 18 years old.

widgets.name: AthleticTeam_SponsorshipExtentDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the extent of sponsorship the named insured provides for the athletic team.

widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the type of sport in which the sponsored athletic team is involved.

widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the sport participants are 12 years old or under.

widgets.name: AthleticTeam_AgeGroup_ThirteenThroughEighteenIndicator_B
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the sport participants are 13 through 18 years old.

widgets.name: AthleticTeam_AgeGroup_OverEighteenIndicator_B
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the sport participants are over 18 years old.

widgets.name: AthleticTeam_SponsorshipExtentDescription_B
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the extent of sponsorship the named insured provides for the athletic team.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_ACGCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any structural alterations contemplated?".

widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any structural alterations contemplated.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_DemolitionExposureContemplatedExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any demolition exposure contemplated.

widgets.name: Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage).

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_AABCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Has applicant been active in or is currently active in joint ventures?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_ApplicantActiveJointVenturesExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any joint ventures in which the applicant may be currently active.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_AACCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Do you lease employees to or from other employers?".

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_FullName_B
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's full name. As used here, this is the company to whom employees are leased.

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_WorkersCompensationCarriedCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is workers compensation coverage carried?".

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_FullName_C
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's full name. As used here, this is the company to whom employees are leased.

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_WorkersCompensationCarriedCode_B
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is workers compensation coverage carried?".

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_FullName_D
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's full name. As used here, this is the company from whom employees are leased.

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_WorkersCompensationCarriedCode_C
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is workers compensation coverage carried?".

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_FullName_E
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The additional interest's full name. As used here, this is the company from whom employees are leased.

widgets.name: AdditionalInterest_WorkersCompensationCarriedCode_D
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates the response to the question, "Is workers compensation coverage carried?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_AADCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Is there a labor interchange with any other business or subsidiaries?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_LabourInterchangeOtherBusinessSubsidiariesExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any labor interchange with any other business or subsidiaries.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_AAECode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are day care facilities operated or controlled?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_DayCareFacilitiesOperatedExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any daycare facilities operated or controlled.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_AAFCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Have any crimes occurred or been attempted on your premises within the last specified number of years?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_CrimesOccurredOrAttemptedLastThreeYearsExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any crimes that  occurred or been attempted on your premises within the last three (3) years

widgets.name: Contractors_Question_AAGCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Is there a formal, written safety and security policy in effect?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_FormalSafetySecurityPolicyInEffectExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any formal, written safety and security policy in effect.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_Question_AAGCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Does the business' promotional literature make any representation about the safety or security of the premises?".

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_BusinessPromotionalLiteratureSafetyRepresentationsExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation of any business promotional literature that makes any representations about the safety or security of the premises.

widgets.name: GeneralLiabilityLineOfBusiness_RemarkText_B
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The remarks associated with the general liability line of business.  Use this section to provide any additional information required for underwriting or rating.  ACORD 101, Additional Remarks Schedule, may be attached if more space is required.

widgets.name: Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_Signature_A
widgets.tooltip: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the authorized representative (e.g., producer, agent, broker, etc.) of the company(ies) listed on the document.  This is required in most states.

widgets.name: Producer_AuthorizedRepresentative_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the authorized representative of the producer, agency and/or broker that signed the form.

widgets.name: Producer_StateLicenseIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The State License Number of the producer.

widgets.name: NamedInsured_Signature_A
widgets.tooltip: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the applicant or named insured.

widgets.name: NamedInsured_SignatureDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The date the form was signed by the applicant or named insured.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: Producer_NationalIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The National Producer Number (NPN) as defined in the National Insurance Producer Registry (NIPR).  Note: The NPN is not the same as the producer state license number.
